title: rubus subinsectifolius
intro: Rubus subinsectifolius, also known as the dwarf raspberry or fragrant raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus subinsectifolius include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall health. Herbal preparations of Rubus subinsectifolius can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
